PROP-01b-partial-inv-003.text: _multiCall in auctionCallback has no reentrancy guard; re-entrant calls may cause inconsistent state.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-003.assertion: forall _multiCall(calls): no external call target can re-enter AuctionBidder state-changing functions

locations.note: no reentrancy guard in _multiCall; external calls at line 59 (_call) can re-enter AuctionBidder
calls _multiCall at line 109; BaseAuction.bid has s_entered guard but AuctionBidder itself has no reentrancy protection
